sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 21:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 21:1
items.html: Because the first Hey is the principal, since the screen is from Partzuf SAG. The bottom Hey is subordinate to it, having connected to it through the illumination of SAG below Tabur. (Inner Observation, Item 7)
